base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of second_quest_marker — a ui from 1986 legend of zelda. '2ND QUEST' indicator — shown on save-file after beating Quest 1. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: '2ND QUEST' indicator — shown on save-file after beating Quest 1; unlocks harder Quest 2 with different dungeon layouts
